releases.summary: CVE-2025-55182 / CVE-2025-66478 (React2Shell): CVSS 10.0 RCE in React Server Components — unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code via crafted HTTP request. Actively exploited in the wild; 766+ Next.js hosts breached as of April 2026. Additional DoS via RSC (GHSA-q4gf-8mx6-v5v3, high severity) affects all versions >=9.3.4-canary.0. Fix: upgrade to 16.2.4 across all repos.
releases.breaking_changes: Next.js 16 removes synchronous access to Async Request APIs (cookies, headers, params, searchParams). Code relying on sync access will throw — must be refactored to await these calls.

releases.summary: Maintenance patch — adds cycle protections for React Server Components. Non-breaking, safe to upgrade.

v4.2.4 fixes Vite alias resolution in @import/@plugin. v4.2.3 (April 20) improves tracking-* utility canonicalization. Full v4 rebuild performance: 3.5s → <100ms vs v3. the-squeeze is on v3 and should plan v4 migration.
releases.breaking_changes: v3 → v4 is a significant migration: CSS-first config replaces tailwind.config.js, new @import syntax, utility class renames.

releases.summary: TypeScript 6.0 Final released March 17, 2026. TypeScript 5.9 remains the last 5.x release (August 2025). All repos are one major version behind.
releases.breaking_changes: TypeScript 6 removes several deprecated patterns and tightens strictness rules. Migration guide available on GitHub gist.

releases.summary: Node.js 22.x security patch March 24, 2026: 2 high severity issues fixed — memory leak in HTTP/2 servers (WINDOW_UPDATE frame overflow), V8 hash collision attack enabling performance degradation. If running Node.js 22 in production, ensure runtime is patched. LTS through April 30, 2027.
Bug-fix release: fixes tooltip flicker in syncMethod=value, keyboard navigation when active index is outside zoomed area, PieChart double-padding with value=0 items. Non-breaking.
Major version bump to 1.x — repos on 0.x are behind. API changes likely; review migration guide before upgrading.
releases.breaking_changes: Major version bump 0.x → 1.x; check changelog for renamed/removed icons.

releases.summary: Vercel platform updates: AI Gateway now includes GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V4 (1M token context), Claude Opus 4.7. Vercel Flags (feature flags) now built into dashboard. Vercel CLI v52 available (texas-elections on v50 — 2 major versions behind). Security incident disclosed April 2026 — review bulletin at vercel.com/changelog.

summary.top_action: Upgrade next to 16.2.4 across all repos immediately — CVE-2025-55182 (CVSS 10.0) is actively exploited. the-squeeze, Career-Portfolio, and orbit-dashboard are on Next.js 15.x and need both a major version upgrade and async API refactor.
summary.breaking_change_alert: Next.js 15→16 requires refactoring sync usage of cookies(), headers(), params, and searchParams to async/await. Plan this carefully — it is NOT a drop-in upgrade.
